1 This column documents whether the patient was on a feeding tube as their nutritional approach at the time of admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
526 FEED_TUBE_7_DAY_CD FEED_TUBE_7_DAY_CD Nutritional Approaches (7 days): Feeding tube CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient has been on a feeding tube as their nutritional approach in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
527 FEED_TUBE_DSCHRG_CD FEED_TUBE_DSCHRG_CD Nutritional
